Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Start_Your_Business.asp

# Formation and Startup Route to SBDC

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
You are moving toward Formation. SBDC can help you organize the business plan, startup costs, funding readiness, licenses/permits questions, and launch sequence. Legal and tax decisions should still be verified with qualified professionals.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
